sequences.description: Full-width video/carousel hero with patient slides, H1 heading, CTA link, pause/play button. Border-radius 40px top-left on image container.
Splide carousel with 3 press release slides (date + headline + link), prev/next navigation
Featured story card with square image, date, category tag, title, description, read time, CTA
H3 heading 'Patients are at the heart of everything we do', body paragraph, 'Learn more' CTA link
Two-column: poster image with heading overlay (left), Brightcove video player (right). H2 'Advancing Parkinson's Research', subtitle, 'Watch 3:49' button
Section heading: H2 'Science & Innovation', H3 'We solve the tough challenges.', body paragraph
3-column row: 1 linked card (image + 'Science' category + title + 'Learn More' CTA) + 2 stat counters ('75+' conditions, '~57k' employees)
Two-column: podcast promo image (left) + H2 'Science' category + H5 'The Persistence Lab Podcast' + body + 'Learn more' CTA (right)
Section heading: H2 'a culture of curiosity', H3 'We find the answers together.', body paragraph
3-column grid of tall image cards, each with portrait image, body text, and uppercase CTA link (SCIENCE, Learning and Development, Partnerships)
CTA block: H4 'Explore opportunities', body paragraph, 'Browse jobs' link to careers.abbvie.com
Section heading: H2 'INVESTOR RESOURCES', H3 'We invest in creating better futures.', body paragraph
Two-column: Earnings card (H2 'Quarterly Earnings' + H4 title + 'LATEST EARNINGS RELEASE' CTA) + Quick links column (H5 + 3 external links)
Section heading: H2 'ENVIRONMENTAL, SOCIAL AND GOVERNANCE', H3 'We make an impact that lasts.', body paragraph

Full-width container with background image (kids soccer), containing: stat counter ('32%' + label), linked card ('SUSTAINABILITY' + 'Environmental, Social & Governance' + 'Learn More'), and quick links ('AbbVie's Positions & Views' with 3 PDF download links)
AbbVie logo, 5 primary nav links (large text), social media icons (6), Popular Pages (4 links), External Links (4 links), legal disclaimer, copyright, legal links bar
